heading: Screening, counseling, and medical treatment
label: 1751 Screening, counseling, and medical treatment
text: The Secretary is authorized to carry out a comprehensive program of providing sickle cell anemia screening, counseling, treatment, and information under the provisions of this chapter.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section and substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 102–83section 651 of this title
